message:
🐛 Fix offline clusters showing as degraded instead of offline

nodeCount === 0 now also indicates unreachable (offline) status,
not just reachable === false. This fixes kind-testing123 showing
yellow (degraded) instead of offline indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
